rationale: Candidate 1540c973 preserves heading levels exactly (1 H1, 6 H2, 3 H3) matching the English original, while candidate 747a2c6 incorrectly promotes the H3 'At Scale: Object Versioning > Normalization' to H2, violating the MDX preservation requirement.
